title: Italian Meatball Soup
description: A hearty Italian-inspired soup filled with garlicky meatballs and savory vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Italian mincemeat and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the garlicky soup mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the canned diced tomatoes, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
